title: Data Scientist
description: Build ML models at scale using Python and TensorFlow. Strong SQL and analytics required.

title: Backend Developer
description: Build and maintain REST APIs using FastAPI. Experience with PostgreSQL and Docker required.

title: ML Engineer Intern
description: Work on real ML problems using scikit-learn. Python and pandas experience required.

title: React Developer
description: Build responsive web apps with React and TypeScript. Node.js backend knowledge is a plus.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Manage cloud infrastructure using AWS and Kubernetes. Docker and Linux experience required.
